name: PT Capitalinc Investment Tbk
summary: PT Capitalinc Investment Tbk operates in the oil and gas sector in Indonesia. The company engages in the exploration, development, and production of oil and natural gas with an area of 5,448.48 square kilometers in the East Kangean; and participates in the exploration, development, and exploitation of petroleum resources covering Seinangka-Senipah Block in East Kalimantan covering an area of 60.61 kilometers square kilometers. It also has an agreement for the exploration and production of crude oil and gas based on production sharing contract in the Air Komering Block, South Sumatera. PT Capitalinc Investment Tbk was founded in 1983 and is based in South Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Capitalinc Investment Tbk opeartes as a subsidiary of BFC SPV Ltd
